CREATE TABLE TestConfig (Key VARCHAR(255), Value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO TestConfig VALUES ('ServerPort', '1111');
INSERT INTO TestConfig VALUES ('CacheSize', '4096');
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '2222');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'CacheSize', '8192');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'CacheSize';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '0');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '-1');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '65536');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'CacheSize', '100000');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'CacheSize';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '8080');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort' AND Value = '8080';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '9999');
SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort' AND Value IN ('1111', '2222');
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', '3000');
SELECT CASE WHEN Value LIKE '%3000%' THEN 'Updated' ELSE 'Not Updated' END AS Status FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
cfg_write(virtuoso_ini_path(), 'Parameters', 'ServerPort', (SELECT Value FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TestConfig WHERE Key = 'ServerPort';
